74638.subject: Standard Chartered Note Sparks 22% UNI Rally
74638.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* [UNI gains 22% after Standard Chartered $100 target](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/uni-22-percent-24-hours-621m-volume-standard-chartered-bull-thesis)

* [AetherStrike tokenizes material holding US infra together ](https://thedefiant.io/education/research-and-opinion/the-material-holding-america-together-is-disappearing-aetherstrike-tokenized-it?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kraken-and-coinbase-bring-perps-onshore-as-btc-tops-67k-intraday&_bhlid=b1f6d429ea7bcbffe63ba977ec5acce634845b1c)_[[partner]](https://thedefiant.io/education/research-and-opinion/the-material-holding-america-together-is-disappearing-aetherstrike-tokenized-it?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kraken-and-coinbase-bring-perps-onshore-as-btc-tops-67k-intraday&_bhlid=b1f6d429ea7bcbffe63ba977ec5acce634845b1c)_

* [Coinbase teases 1:1-backed tokenized US stocks](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/coinbase-teases-1-1-backed-tokenized-u-s-stocks-with-on-chain-dividends)

* [DeFi fees slump up to 65% as leverage drains after June selloff](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/defi-lending-and-dex-fees-slump-as-leverage-drains-out-after-june-selloff)

* [Binance could lose EU access as Greek regulator rejects license](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/binance-could-face-eu-exit-as-reports-say-greek-regulator-is-set-to-reject-mica-license)

* [BlackRock launches BITA covered-call BTC ETF](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/blackrock-launches-bita-covered-call-bitcoin-etf-monthly-income)

* [Your AI Knows Everything About You: ZetaChain bets on private AI ](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kraken-and-coinbase-bring-perps-onshore-as-btc-tops-67k-intraday&_bhlid=7a67ac5e61582435aeff86958cea26f421ef9fc5)_[[partner]](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kraken-and-coinbase-bring-perps-onshore-as-btc-tops-67k-intraday&_bhlid=7a67ac5e61582435aeff86958cea26f421ef9fc5)_

UNI [ran 22% in 24 hours to $3.28 on $621 million of trading volume Tuesday](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/uni-22-percent-24-hours-621m-volume-standard-chartered-bull-thesis), the highest-percentile single-day move in recent CoinGecko tracking for the token, and **Uniswap's biggest day ever** measured on the combined price-plus-volume signal. The proximate catalyst was Monday's [Standard Chartered research note from Geoff Kendrick](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/standard-chartered-sets-uni-2030-price-target-at-40x-current-levels), the bank's global head of digital-assets research, initiating coverage of the DEX with a $100 UNI target for end-2030 and framing Uniswap as the trading hub for tokenized real-world assets. A 40x long-term target from a globally systemic bank, and the token clear

74515.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 14
74515.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-14-oleh-bezuhlyi-akqxf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BmbZ4FC4IQ0mg0XDN2T%2BrWg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3vrdyj7E8K3ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqe0o02q~q3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqe0o02q-q3
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: A July 1 MiCA cutoff looms for millions of EU crypto users while a DPRK-linked $36M hack and a UK naval seizure exposing USDT sanctions evasion show that crypto's geopolitical risk is no longer theoretical. 🚨 Millions of EU Crypto Users Face Exchange Cutoff as MiCA Deadline Hits in Days On July 1, 2026, the temporary operating permission that allowed crypto companies to serve EU customers while awaiting a full MiCA license expires — and exchanges, brokers, and wallet services that have not secured authorization must immediately cut off access to European users with no further grace period. CryptoSlate reports that the deadline creates a live operational crisis for ordinary investors who may lose access to their funds, positions, or platforms overnight, with little notice from providers scrambling to reach compliance. Read full story 💀 Humanity Protocol's $36M Hack Linked to Suspected North Korean Hackers Cybersecurity firm Quantstamp has attributed the $36 million breach of Humanity Protocol to suspected North Korean threat actors, identifying a fraudulent phishing email spoofing crypto exchange Bithumb as the attack's primary entry vector. The incident adds another eight-figure sum to the growing ledger of assets stolen by DPRK-affiliated hacking groups, which have systematically targeted blockchain projects to fund state programs operating under international sanctions. More details ⚖️ CFTC No-Action Letter Opens First Legal Path for Digital Commodity Perpetuals in the US The CFTC issued a staff no-action letter that clears a legal runway for perpetual futures contracts on digital commodities to operate within the United States — a product category that has until now existed almost exclusively at offshore venues to sidestep regulatory uncertainty. The guidance provides immediate operational clarity for US-domiciled exchanges and their institutional clients, who have long been unable to offer the perpetual swap structures that dominate global crypto derivatives volumes. Read more 📊 SEC Proposes Reg NMS Rule Changes That Could Reshape Tokenized Stock Trading The SEC has proposed rescinding Rules 611 and 610e of Regulation NMS — the order-protection and access rules that have governed US equity market structure for two decades — in a move with substantial downstream implications for how tokenized st

74347.subject: cenová ponuka
74347.body:
Dobrý deň Vám prajem, 

na základe nášho stretnutia Vám posielam spracovanú cenovú ponuku.

Cenová ponuka je orientačná a nezáväzná, čokoľvek sa môže zmeniť, upraviť, pridať, ubrať. Výsledná suma vždy závisí od konkrétnych predstáv a požiadavok klienta, od druhu a množstva použitých živých a všetkých ostatných materiálov. 

Štandardne pracujeme tak, že takto dopredu pred svadbou pripravujem ponuku, ktorá je orientačná. Ťažko dopredu určiť presnú sumu a takisto ani Vy nemusíte ešte teraz presne vedieť koľko príde nakoniec hostí, ako sa bude sedieť, koľko stolov budete potrebovať, ako sa môžu zmeniť Vaše predstavy. :-)
Zhruba dva týždne pred svadbou, ako som už spomínala, prípadne podľa potreby skôr sa pripraví predbežná kalkulácia, ktorá sa vyrátava už na základe reálnych počtov položiek a požiadavok a v neposlednom rade počtu hostí.
Všetko je to v prvom rade o komunikácii. Snažím sa jednať s ľuďmi fér, seriózne a k práci pristupovať zodpovedne.
Myslím, že sa dá na mňa v čomkoľvek obrátiť a spoľahnúť. 

Kľudne si ponuku preštudujte a ak by ste mali akékoľvek otázky, chceli sa na čokoľvek opýtať, ak by ste chceli niečo zmeniť, pridať, ubrať, prípadne nastaviť si výšku budgetu kľudne sa na mňa obráťte, rada Vám odpoviem, pomôžem, poradím. 
Všetko som pripravila tak, aby to bolo čo najjednoduchšie pochopiteľné. Ak by bolo čokoľvek nejasné, pýtajte sa.

Ak som na niečo zabudla kľudne ma doplňte. 😉

Budem čakať za Vašou spätnou väzbou.

Prajem krásny deň.



S pozdravom / Best regards

Bc. Lucia Ortutová
Event manager/wedding coordinator

+421 907 382 402
www.dekoracnyservis.sk
info@dekoracnyservis.sk
